gist.headline: A picture is worth a thousand tokens
gist.blurb: Scene2Text just sprouted in the community greenhouse. It looks at scenes and writes down what it sees, saving you the trouble of using your own words.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Scene2Text app to the writing section of the apps directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and access Scene2Text directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an app that turns scenes into text. Polly the bee holding a camera that prints out a scroll of text instead of a photo, with the Monitor Robot reading it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny vintage camera that prints out a long scroll of text instead of a photo. A chunky retro monitor robot stands nearby, reading the text with excited square pixel eyes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
